generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are increasingly relying on us to shoulder their defense burdens? While we value our alliances, it's time to ask: why should American taxpayers fund the defense of nations that can afford to protect themselves? Strengthening our own defenses while encouraging burden-sharing is the smarter, more responsible approach. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
